sentences.english: As we get older, many of us notice our sense of hearing getting worse.
sentences.korean: 나이가 들면 많은 사람이 청력이 나빠지는 걸 알아차려요.

sentences.english: In the UK alone, hearing loss affects 18 million people and that number is increasing.
sentences.korean: 영국에서만 1800만 명에게 영향을 미치고 그 수는 증가하고 있어요.

sentences.english: Did you know that the three smallest bones in the human body — the hammer, the anvil and the stirrup — are found in the ear?
sentences.korean: 인체에서 가장 작은 세 뼈 — 망치뼈, 모루뼈, 등자뼈 — 가 귀에 있다는 걸 알고 있었나요?
